description: Attio is a CRM platform for managing records, lists, tasks, notes, meetings, and related workspace data. It also provides a developer platform for building integrations, apps, and AI-agent connections into Attio workspaces.
summary: Attio exposes a public REST API at https://api.attio.com authenticated with either OAuth 2.0 user tokens or single-workspace API keys, plus a hosted OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.attio.com/mcp.
